briefdescription.para: Fill the epoch wave with epochs before DAQ/TP.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable channel, variable baselinefrac, variable testPulseLength, variable offset, variable amplitude)
memberdef.name: EP_AddEpochsFromTP

briefdescription.para: Adds four epochs for a test pulse and three sub epochs for test pulse components.

parameterdescription.para: test pulse length in micro seconds
start time of test pulse in micro seconds
amplitude of the TP in the DA wave without gain

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable channel, string oodDAQRegions, variable stimsetBegin, variable stimsetEnd)
memberdef.name: EP_AddEpochsFromOodDAQRegions

parameterdescription.para: string containing list of oodDAQ regions as d-d;...
offset time in micro seconds where stim set begins
offset time in micro seconds where stim set ends

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable channel, wave stimset, variable stimsetBegin, variable setLength, variable sweep, variable scale)
memberdef.name: EP_AddEpochsFromStimSetNote

briefdescription.para: Adds epochs for a stimset and sub epochs for stimset components currently adds also sub sub epochs for pulse train components.

parameterdescription.para: offset time in micro seconds where stim set begins
length of stimset in micro seconds
scale factor between the stimsets internal amplitude to the DA wave without gain

briefdescription.para: Sorts all epochs per channel in EpochsWave.

detaileddescription.para: Removes epochs marked for removal, those with NaN as StartTime and EndTime, as well.

Sorting:
Ascending starting time
Descending ending time
Ascending tree level

briefdescription.para: Returns the number of epoch in the epochsWave for the given channel.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable channelType, variable channelNumber, variable epBegin, variable epEnd, string tags, string shortName=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: EP_AddUserEpoch

detaileddescription.para: Allows to add user epochs for not yet finished sweeps. The tree level is fixed to EPOCH_USER_LEVEL to not collide with stock entries.

parameterdescription.para: channel type, currently only XOP_CHANNEL_TYPE_DAC is supported
start time of the epoch in seconds
end time of the epoch in seconds
[optional, defaults to auto-generated] user defined short name for the epoch, will be prefixed with EPOCH_SHORTNAME_USER_PREFIX

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable channel, variable epBegin, variable epEnd, string epTags, string epShortName, variable level=defaultValue, variable lowerlimit=defaultValue, variable upperlimit=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: EP_AddEpoch

briefdescription.para: Adds a epoch to the epochsWave.

parameterdescription.para: start time of the epoch in micro seconds
end time of the epoch in micro seconds
short name of the epoch, should be unique
[optional, default = -Inf] epBegin is limited between lowerlimit and Inf, epEnd must be > this limit
[optional, default = Inf] epEnd is limited between -Inf and upperlimit, epBegin must be < this limit

briefdescription.para: Write the epoch info into the sweep settings wave.
Convert the epochs wave layer given by channel to a string suitable for storing the labnotebook.
Converts a string containing epoch information in the format that is stored in the Labnotebook to a 2D epoch wave.

parameterdescription.para: string with epoch information in the format as stored in the labnotebook

simplesect.para: 2D text wave with epoch information, use EPOCH_COL_ constants for column access

briefdescription.para: Returns the ShortName from a epoch name string, empty string if no ShortName is present.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, wave configWave, variable acquiredTime, variable plannedTime)
memberdef.name: EP_AdaptEpochInfo

listitem.para: Adjust epoch end time to the acquired time
Blanks out which are then too small or lie outside the acquired region

parameterdescription.para: Last time point in the sweep [s]

memberdef.argsstring: (wave numericalValues, wave textualValues, variable sweepNo, variable channelType, variable channelNumber, string shortname, variable treelevel=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: EP_GetEpochs

briefdescription.para: Get epochs from the LBN filtered by given parameters.

parameterdescription.para: short name filter, can be a regular expression which is matched caseless
[optional: default = not set] tree level of epochs, if not set then treelevel is ignored

simplesect.para: Text wave with epoch information, only rows fitting the input parameters are returned. Can also be a null wave.

briefdescription.para: EP Handle code relating to epoch information
